active_cycle.goal: Drive only post-refactor responsive-tree architecture hardening and controlled-use preparation while preserving evidence and pilot boundaries.

tasks.title: Reset post-refactor active queue
tasks.objective: Archive the old pre-refactor active queue lineage as non-authoritative history and establish this post-refactor responsive-tree active queue.
allowed_work: Inventory queue, ledger, control-plane, schemas, validators, and workflow state.
Preserve legacy queue and ledger history as non-authoritative history.
Replace the active queue driver with post-refactor RTAQ tasks.
forbidden_work: Do not create submitted evidence.
Do not modify Issue #8.
Do not run or authorize the real pilot.
Do not upgrade readiness or validation claims.
acceptance_criteria: Old RQ-0023 through RQ-0026 lineage no longer drives the active queue.
Historical queue and ledger lineage remains preserved or explicitly referenced as archived history.
Post-refactor active queue uses RTAQ task IDs.
Queue and ledger validators pass.
tasks.notes: This task is not complete until its PR is merged and merge-final bookkeeping is intentionally reconciled.

tasks.title: Add submitted packet issue-reference consistency check
tasks.objective: Ensure submitted packet eligibility is tied to the expected Issue #8 reference and evidence submission state.
allowed_work: Add or extend bounded validators and fixtures for issue-reference consistency.
Keep all checks evidence-bounded and CI-exercised.
forbidden_work: Do not create submitted evidence.
Do not modify Issue #8.
Do not run or authorize the real pilot.
Do not upgrade readiness or validation claims.
acceptance_criteria: Wrong issue reference cannot pass submitted-readiness eligibility.
Missing issue URL or ref cannot pass eligibility.
Stale or invalid evidence submission status cannot pass eligibility.
CI passes without real evidence execution.

tasks.title: Add submitted packet freshness and sample-marker rejection
tasks.objective: Ensure stale, sample-marked, or placeholder-hash submitted packets cannot be treated as real issue submissions.
allowed_work: Add or extend bounded validation for sample markers, placeholder hashes, and stale submitted packet state.
Add negative fixtures for sample, placeholder, and stale inputs.
forbidden_work: Do not create submitted evidence.
Do not modify Issue #8.
Do not run or authorize the real pilot.
Do not upgrade readiness or validation claims.
acceptance_criteria: Sample markers and placeholder hashes block submitted eligibility.
Stale packet state blocks submitted eligibility.
CI passes without real evidence execution.

tasks.title: Prepare controlled-use readiness snapshot
tasks.objective: Create an evidence-bounded controlled-use readiness snapshot that distinguishes controlled-use readiness from production or release readiness.
allowed_work: Summarize merged architecture contracts, validators, and remaining evidence blockers.
Keep Issue #8 evidence-pending and pilot-blocked state explicit.
forbidden_work: Do not create submitted evidence.
Do not modify Issue #8.
Do not run or authorize the real pilot.
Do not claim production, release, live render, export, accessibility, or pixel validation.
acceptance_criteria: Snapshot states controlled-use boundaries only.
Real pilot remains blocked.
CI success is described as repository-check evidence only.

tasks.title: Refresh RTA queue after first post-refactor tasks
tasks.objective: Audit RTAQ-0001 through RTAQ-0004 outcomes and refresh the active post-refactor queue without creating real evidence.
allowed_work: Review merged PRs and CI outcomes for RTAQ-0001 through RTAQ-0004.
Maintain at least four legitimate pending tasks.
forbidden_work: Do not create submitted evidence.
Do not modify Issue #8.
Do not run or authorize the real pilot.
Do not upgrade readiness or validation claims.
acceptance_criteria: Post-refactor queue remains the active driver.
Evidence-pending blockers remain visible.
CI passes without real evidence execution.

tasks.title: Create first-run guide for controlled manual use
tasks.objective: Write a first-run guide for bounded manual use of the responsive-tree architecture pipeline without treating it as production readiness.
allowed_work: Document manual inputs, expected outputs, and stop conditions.
Keep evidence, pilot, and readiness boundaries visible.
forbidden_work: Do not create submitted evidence.
Do not modify Issue #8.
Do not run or authorize the real pilot.
Do not claim production or release readiness.
acceptance_criteria: Guide supports controlled manual use only.
Guide preserves evidence and pilot blockers.
No production or release language is introduced.

tasks.title: Create guarded handoff pack
tasks.objective: Package the current responsive-tree architecture contracts, validators, and manual-use boundaries into a guarded handoff pack.
allowed_work: Reference active contracts, schemas, validators, and queue boundaries.
Document what remains blocked by missing real submitted evidence.
forbidden_work: Do not create submitted evidence.
Do not modify Issue #8.
Do not run or authorize the real pilot.
Do not upgrade validation or readiness claims.
acceptance_criteria: Handoff pack is guarded by explicit evidence boundaries.
Issue #8 remains evidence-pending unless real submitted evidence is later provided.
Real pilot remains blocked.
